tables.name: users
tables.description: Registered buyers on the e-commerce marketplace. Stores user identity, contact details, geographic location, and account status. Each user has a timezone preference for displaying timestamps in their local time.

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Unique internal identifier for the user, auto-incremented by the database

columns.name: email
columns.description: User login email address, must be unique across all users

columns.name: full_name
columns.description: User display name shown on the platform

columns.name: phone
columns.description: Contact phone number in E.164 format, e.g. +919876543210

columns.name: timezone
columns.description: IANA timezone identifier for displaying dates in local time, e.g. Asia/Kolkata or America/New_York

columns.name: city
columns.description: City of residence of the user

columns.name: country
columns.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, e.g. IN for India, US for United States

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Account status flag: 1 means the account is active, 0 means it has been deactivated

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when the user account was created

columns.name: last_login_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds of the most recent successful login, NULL if the user has never logged in

tables.name: sellers
tables.description: Merchants who list and sell products on the marketplace. Stores seller identity, contact information, geographic location, performance rating, and account status. A seller can list multiple products in the catalog.

columns.name: seller_id
columns.description: Unique internal identifier for the seller, auto-incremented by the database

columns.name: seller_name
columns.description: Business or brand name of the seller as shown to buyers

columns.name: contact_email
columns.description: Primary contact email for the seller, must be unique across all sellers

columns.name: phone
columns.description: Seller contact phone number in E.164 format

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where the seller primarily operates

columns.name: country
columns.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the seller

columns.name: rating
columns.description: Rolling average buyer rating from 0.0 to 5.0 computed across all fulfilled orders

columns.name: total_reviews
columns.description: Total number of buyer reviews received by the seller

columns.name: joined_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when the seller account was approved and activated

columns.name: is_active
columns.description: Seller account status flag: 1 means actively selling, 0 means suspended or deactivated

tables.name: catalog
tables.description: Product listings created by sellers. Each product belongs to exactly one seller and one top-level category. Stores pricing, categorisation, and availability status. The price field reflects the current list price, but orders capture unit_price at the time of purchase.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique internal identifier for the product, auto-incremented by the database

columns.name: seller_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing sellers.seller_id, identifies which seller listed this product

columns.name: product_name
columns.description: Human-readable product title displayed to buyers on the product listing page

columns.name: category
columns.description: Top-level product category, e.g. Electronics, Clothing, Books, Home, Sports

columns.name: subcategory
columns.description: Optional finer-grained product category, e.g. Smartphones, T-Shirts, Novels, Furniture

columns.name: brand
columns.description: Brand or manufacturer name of the product

columns.name: sku
columns.description: Seller-assigned stock-keeping unit code, optional but unique when provided

columns.name: price
columns.description: Current list price of the product in USD at the time of listing or last update

columns.name: description
columns.description: Full product description text shown on the product detail page

columns.name: image_url
columns.description: URL to the primary product image

columns.name: is_available
columns.description: Product availability flag: 1 means listed and available for purchase, 0 means delisted

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when the product was first listed in the catalog

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when the product details were last modified

tables.name: inventory
tables.description: Current stock levels for products across multiple warehouse locations. Each row represents one product at one warehouse. A product may be stocked in multiple warehouses; the total available stock is the sum of quantity across all matching rows.

columns.name: inventory_id
columns.description: Unique internal identifier for the inventory record, auto-incremented by the database

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing catalog.product_id, identifies which product this stock record belongs to

columns.name: warehouse
columns.description: Warehouse location code identifying where the stock is held, e.g. MUM-01, DEL-02, BLR-03

columns.name: quantity
columns.description: Current number of units available at this warehouse, never negative

columns.name: reorder_level
columns.description: Stock quantity threshold that triggers a reorder alert when quantity falls at or below this level

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when this stock level was last updated

tables.name: orders
tables.description: Purchase transactions placed by users. Each row is one line item representing one product in one order. A multi-product cart results in multiple rows with different order_ids. Captures pricing at purchase time, shipping details, and the full order lifecycle status.

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Unique internal identifier for the order line item, auto-incremented by the database

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing users.user_id, identifies the buyer who placed this order

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing catalog.product_id, identifies which product was ordered

columns.name: seller_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing sellers.seller_id, denormalised from the catalog for efficient seller-level queries

columns.name: quantity
columns.description: Number of units of the product ordered, must be at least 1

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Price per unit at the time of purchase, captured as a snapshot from catalog.price

columns.name: total_amount
columns.description: Pre-computed total value of the line item: quantity multiplied by unit_price, used for reporting

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current order lifecycle state: pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered, or cancelled

columns.name: shipping_city
columns.description: Destination city for package delivery

columns.name: ordered_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when the order was placed by the user

columns.name: confirmed_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when payment was confirmed, NULL if not yet confirmed

columns.name: shipped_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when the package was dispatched for delivery, NULL if not yet shipped

columns.name: delivered_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when the package was delivered to the buyer, NULL if not yet delivered

columns.name: cancelled_at
columns.description: Unix epoch seconds representing when the order was cancelled, NULL if not cancelled
